title: Research: KISS protocol requirements for LICHEN integration
description: Research KISS framing for LICHEN: (1) review KISS spec (ARRL/TAPR), frame format, escape sequences, command types; (2) survey how other projects use KISS (Direwolf, kissattach, APRSdroid); (3) decide payload type: raw IPv6 packets (like SLIP but with KISS framing), raw LICHEN link frames, or both via port numbers; (4) identify which KISS commands matter (Data, TxDelay, SetHardware, Return); (5) document expected use cases (gateway, debugging, packet injection, APRS bridge).
acceptance_criteria: Design doc with: KISS frame format for LICHEN, payload type decision, supported commands, use case coverage
close_reason: Created spec/kiss-framing.md covering: KISS protocol spec (frame format, escape sequences, all commands), real-world usage survey (APRSDroid/Direwolf/kissattach), payload type decision (Port 0 = AX.25/APRS, Port 1 = raw LICHEN), command support matrix, and use cases (gateway, debugging, injection, APRS bridge). 291 lines.
